remaining_params.CostDesc: {2}, Exile a nonland card from your hand:
remaining_params.StackDescription: Put four time counters on the exiled card.
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Put four time counters on the exiled card. If it doesn't have suspend, it gains suspend. (At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter from that card. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. If it's a creature, it has haste.)
